chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D - 1780 of 2023 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) D/o Matter 1. For orders on CMA No.107/2026 2. For orders on CMA No.108/2026 3. For orders on CMA No.109/2026 23.01.2026 Mr. Riaz Ahmed Phulpoto, Advocate along with Ms. Kausar Sultana, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Safdar Deeper, Addl. A.G. Sindh. ------------------------------------ 1. Urgency granted. 2-3. Through this application, the petitioner has prayed for recalling of order dated 15.09.2025, whereby the instant petition was dismissed for non-prosecution along with the pending applications. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that previously the matter was fixed on 24.04.2025, however, on the said date the matter was discharged as per approved policy and thereafter the same was fixed on 15.09.2025 for which date no notice or intimation has been received by the petitioner who hails from Sukkur due to which he could not appear before the Court on 15.09.2025 when the matter was fixed before the Court. Learned Addl. A. G. has no objection to the restoration of the matter. Accordingly, the matter stands restored to its original position as it was on 15.09.2025. Let fresh notice be issued to the respondents for 18.02.2026. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Azeem
